title: chrysopsis linearifolia
intro: Chrysopsis linearifolia, also known as Devil's Bells, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chrysopsis linearifolia include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Chrysopsis linearifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
